name: libset-intspan-perl
title: libset-intspan-perl
summary: module to manage sets of integers
description:
module to manage sets of integers
The Set::IntSpan module manages sets of integers.
It is optimized for sets that have long runs of consecutive integers.
These arise, for example, in .newsrc files, which maintain lists of articles.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libset-intspan-perl because module to manage sets of integers.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libset-intspan-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libset-intspan-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libset-intspan-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
